Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Identify Patterns and Structure Start End Every case starts with Receive Application RA and ends with Archive Case AC Between these there is always Send Confirmation SC just before AC and Approval Decision AD just before SC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Core Sequence Always starts with Receive Application RA followed by Validate Form VF Then Assess Eligibility AE follows VF

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looping Repetition Behavior After Assess Eligibility AE things diverge In Case 2 it goes straight to AD In Case 1 it goes to RMI VF AD In Case 3 it goes to RMI RMI VF AD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: This looks like an optional loop structure involving requesting missing info and re validating

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Prompt definition for loop A B is a loop Execute A then either exit or execute B then A again

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If we use loop A B A must happen at least once Case 2 goes directly AE to AD There is no RMI no second VF

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Therefore to represent Case 2 which skips the loop entirely alongside Cases 1 and 3 which perform the loop we likely need an XOR at the higher level to choose between Do nothing and Enter Loop

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Observed subtraces between AE and AD Empty RMI VF RMI RMI VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: This looks like repeated RMI followed by VF Choice 1 tau matches Case 2 Choice 2 sequence of loop RMI then VF matches Case 1 and 3

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If I want a simple repetition of RMI one or more loop RMI tau Execute RMI Exit for one RMI or tau then RMI for two RMIs

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the Fix Block is sequence of loop RMI tau then VF And the decision to enter this block is an XOR with tau Middle Node is X tau sequence loop RMI tau then VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now assemble the full tree Root Operator Sequence Children RA VF AE the Middle Loop Choice Node AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC XOR node chooses tau Match

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD XOR right branch Loop RMI executes once then VF Match

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD XOR right branch Loop RMI executes twice then VF Match

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: No evidence of parallelism The log looks strictly sequential per case I will stick to Sequence XOR Loop

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Keeping the two VF activities separate is accurate to the log The first VF is mandatory The second VF is conditional on the loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Final String Construction sequence Receive Application RA Validate Form VF Assess Eligibility AE X tau sequence loop Request Missing Info RMI tau Validate Form VF Approval Decision AD Send Confirmation SC Archive Case AC
